creator: mva@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Mikhail T. from comment #6)
 
> If a separate Bugzilla-accounts (mi@FreeBSD.org) exists -- I'm not sure --
> could it, please, be merged with mi@ALDAN.algebra.com? Thanks!

It does, please log out from this account, log in with your FreeBSD name and comment here.
